Name: PV Tracking and Orientation

Caption.String: Enable and disable subarrays on the System Sizing page.
Tracking and orientation options determine whether and how modules in each subarray follows the movement of the sun across the sky.

subarray1_monthly_tilt.Label: Subarray 1 monthly tilt input for seasonal tilt arrays

subarray2_monthly_tilt.Label: Subarray 2 monthly tilt input for seasonal tilt arrays

subarray3_monthly_tilt.Label: Subarray 3 monthly tilt input for seasonal tilt arrays

subarray4_monthly_tilt.Label: Subarray 4 monthly tilt input for seasonal tilt arrays

Callbacks: //tilt=lat checkbox: subarray must be enabled and tracking mode must be fixed, 1-axis, or A-axis
//tilt: subarray must be enabled, tracking mode must be fixed, 1-axis, or A-axis, and tilt=lat must not be checked
//azimuth: subarray must be enabled, tracking mode must be fixed, 1-axis, or seasonal
//tracker rotation limit and backtracking: subarray must be enabled, tracking mode must be 1-axis
// spatial albedo only available for fixed, 1-axis or seasonal tilt tracking
// this function is called on PV Albedo and Radiation form
// show message if azimuth value is out of range to avoid triggering simulation message
// if this subarray is disabled clear message
if ( azimuth < 0 || azimuth > 359.9 ) { //max in ssc vartable is 359.9
msg += 'Azimuth must be between 0 and 359.9 degrees.';
msg += 'Tilt must be between 0 and 90 degrees.';
msg +='Tracker rotation limit must be between 0 and 85 degrees.';
// hide inputs for disabled subarrays (always show subarray 1 inputs)
